questionHtml: the final kinetic energy of the disc and the ring.
markschemeHtml:
The disc has a smaller moment of inertia «because its mass is distributed closer to the axis of rotation» ✓

From Ek=L22l, the disc will achieve a greater kinetic energy «because L is the same for both» ✓

meta.title: the final kinetic energy of the disc and the ring.
